expectations.text: identifies missing pool:forks as a root cause
expectations.evidence: 'pool: forks が未設定（根本原因)'
'better-sqlite3 はネイティブアドオン（.node バイナリ）のため、pool: threads（worker_threads）ではクラッシュやテーブル未発見エラーが発生します'

expectations.text: identifies relative migrationsFolder path as an issue
expectations.evidence: 'migrationsFolder が相対パス' with fix using join(import.meta.dirname, '../../drizzle')

expectations.text: notes that each fork gets its own :memory: DB instance
expectations.evidence: Explains pool:forks = each file in child_process; plus notes drizzle-kit CLI incompatibility with :memory:
